work.title: Lead Software Engineer @UKHSA via Burendo
work.description: Led a cloud-native AWS HPC platform for national genomic surveillance at UKHSA, migrating 140TB of on-premise data to cloud. Achieved 82% cost reduction through Terraform IaC, Kubernetes pipeline optimisation, and large-scale data processing tuning.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer @Bold Science
work.description: Built a scientific communication platform used by the U.S. FDA, serving 200 concurrent users for clients including AstraZeneca, Novartis, and Pfizer. Architected an agentic AI system for pharmaceutical content generation using RAG pipelines, pgvector, FastAPI, and AWS SageMaker.

work.title: Lead Software Engineer @Glasswall
work.description: Led architecture of a file ingest orchestration UI and CDR microservices platform processing 4.4M+ files/day for NATO, Five Eyes, and AUKUS customers. Built a React/Electron offline desktop CDR app deployed to 4+ US government agencies, managing an offshore team with 200+ Playwright E2E tests.

work.title: Senior Software Engineer @Forest Rock Systems
work.description: Developed N4EnergyManager, an IoT energy analytics platform with real-time D3.js visualisations across buildings, data centres, and manufacturing facilities. Built Alarm Manager, a retail alarm system processing 7 million alarms/year for Asda, M&S, and John Lewis across thousands of locations.

work.title: Software Engineer @Deloitte (Keytree)
work.description: Built the Case Service module for Jaguar Land Rover's global CRM platform, serving 2,600+ retail centres across 100+ countries. Developed the EDF Energy React Native mobile app for ~2 million users, with secure authentication and real-time consumption tracking.

work.title: Full Stack JS Developer @Blonk · SuperFastPixels · Greenroom
work.description: Delivered MVP-to-production products at Blonk SAAS, SuperFastPixels, and Greenroom using React, Meteor, Node.js, and MongoDB. Designed a recruitment web app at Blonk that helped the startup raise EUR 200k in investment.
